reviews.comment:
No me vendieron nafta común, por acopio por aumento, sin señal de wifi, sin internet  local, solo efectivo... una vergüenza!

(Translated by Google)
They didn't sell me regular gasoline because of stockpiling increases, no Wi-Fi signal, no local internet, only cash... a disgrace!

reviews.comment:
Se debe hacer fila para cargar combustible y por favor tengan cuidado a la hora de viajar en las zonas. Demasiados carteles de velocidad límite en una RUTA debes ir a 40 km/h. Volviendo a la Estación de servicio, lo demás impecable. Excelente comida y espacio.  Orienten la antena de Dtv 😅

(Translated by Google)
There's a line to get fuel, and please be careful when driving in these areas. Too many speed limit signs on a highway; you should be driving at 40 km/h. Returning to the gas station itself, everything else was impeccable. Excellent food and space. (Adjust the DTV antenna!) 😅
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1cVB2T0FREAE

reviews.comment:
Por lo general hay que hacer colas largas, tienen un sólo surtidor y te provoca demoras. Los playeros son muy amables

(Translated by Google)
There are usually long lines, they only have one pump, and it causes delays. The attendants are very friendly.
